_comment: Google Antigravity MCP Configuration Examples for Google Sheets
_instructions: Copy one of the examples below to your actual mcp_config.json file

EXAMPLE_4_MULTIPLE_MCP_SERVERS._note: You can have multiple MCP servers configured

EXAMPLE_5_RECOMMENDED_FOR_YOUR_PROJECT._note: Based on your existing setup, this is the recommended configuration
EXAMPLE_5_RECOMMENDED_FOR_YOUR_PROJECT._instructions2: 2. Replace the placeholder below with your actual base64 string
EXAMPLE_5_RECOMMENDED_FOR_YOUR_PROJECT._instructions3: 3. Copy the mcpServers object to your mcp_config.json

TROUBLESHOOTING._windows_path_note: Always use double backslashes (\\) in Windows paths
TROUBLESHOOTING._restart_required: After editing mcp_config.json, restart Antigravity completely
TROUBLESHOOTING._validate_json: Ensure valid JSON syntax (no trailing commas, proper quotes)
TROUBLESHOOTING._tool_limit: Keep total enabled MCP tools under 50 for best performance
